# User Manual Verification Report: Sections 5-8
Generated: 2026-01-28

## Summary
Verified sections 5-8 of USER-MANUAL.md against actual code implementation. Found 2 incorrect claims and 1 missing feature documentation.

---

## Issues Found

### ❌ WRONG: Quick payment "기타" button missing
**Manual says (line 708):** "기타 버튼 → 기타 전액 완납 처리"

**Code actually:** Only 3 quick payment buttons exist: 계좌, 카드, 현금
- File: `/home/sean/pacapro/src/components/payments/payment-list.tsx` lines 300-327
- Handler signature: `handleQuickPaymentMark(payment: Payment, method: 'account' | 'card' | 'cash' | 'other')` supports 'other' but UI only renders 3 buttons
- The "기타" button is NOT rendered in the quick payment section

**Fix needed:** Either remove "기타 버튼" from manual line 708, or add the 4th button to payment-list.tsx

---

### ❌ WRONG: Extra day request button location
**Manual says (lines 508-512):** 
```
초과 근무 요청 (강사/직원):
1. 수업 스케줄에서 해당 일자 선택
2. **"추가 수업 요청"** 클릭
```

**Code actually:** Button text is **"미배정 출근"** not "추가 수업 요청"
- File: `/home/sean/pacapro/src/components/schedules/instructor-schedule-panel.tsx` line 384-388
- Button text: "미배정 출근" with UserPlus icon
- Location: Inside the instructor schedule panel (not directly on calendar)

**Fix needed:** Update manual line 510 from "추가 수업 요청" to "미배정 출근"

---

### ⚠️ MISSING: Instructor panel drag & drop not documented correctly
**Manual says (line 599):** "강사 이동 가능 (드래그 앤 드롭)"

**Code check:** No drag-and-drop implementation found in instructor-schedule-panel.tsx
- File: `/home/sean/pacapro/src/components/schedules/instructor-schedule-panel.tsx` (404 lines)
- Instructors are assigned via checkbox selection, not drag-and-drop
- No drag/drop event handlers or libraries (react-dnd, dnd-kit) found

**Status:** Either drag-and-drop was never implemented or was removed. Manual claim cannot be verified.

---

## ✅ Sections Verified OK

### Section 5: 수업 스케줄
- ✅ Calendar view with instructor counts by time slot (schedule-calendar-v2.tsx)
- ✅ Consultation green marker (consultations displayed on calendar dates)
- ✅ Time slot detail modal with attendance tracking (time-slot-detail-modal.tsx)
- ✅ Makeup student addition (보충 학생 추가) feature exists
- ✅ Pending approvals modal (승인 대기) with count badge
- ✅ Instructor schedule panel toggle (panel state saved to localStorage)
- ✅ Student time slot movement feature

### Section 6: 수업일 관리
- ✅ 7-column layout (월/화/수/목/금/토/일) - verified in class-days/page.tsx
- ✅ class_days permission check (lines 46, 85, 100, etc.)
- ✅ Effective start month scheduling (class_days_next field used)
- ✅ Bulk update functionality (studentsAPI.bulkUpdateClassDays)

### Section 7: 학원비 관리
- ✅ Quick payment buttons: 계좌, 카드, 현금 (payment-list.tsx lines 300-327)
- ✅ Prepaid payment modal (v3.8.0) - PrepaidPaymentModal in student-payments.tsx
- ✅ Credit application feature (크레딧 적용) exists
- ✅ Previous month unpaid filter toggle (include_previous_unpaid in payments/page.tsx line 36)
- ✅ Payment filters by status, method, year/month
- ✅ Payment record modal for detailed payment processing

### Section 8: 급여 관리
- ✅ Salary calculation by instructor type (salary-calculator.tsx)
- ✅ Time slot rates: 오전, 오후, 저녁 (lines 84-86, 100-102)
- ✅ Tax/deduction calculation (tax_type, tax_amount fields)
- ✅ 10-won floor rounding (salaries/[id]/page.tsx line 25: `Math.floor(amount / 10) * 10`)
- ✅ Payment status tracking (paid/pending)
- ✅ Excel export functionality
- ✅ PDF export with progress indicator

## Recommendations

1. **High priority:** Remove "기타 버튼" from manual line 708 or add the 4th button to UI
2. **High priority:** Change "추가 수업 요청" to "미배정 출근" in lines 510, 512
3. **Medium priority:** Clarify or remove drag-and-drop claim in line 599
4. **Note:** All v3.8.0 prepaid payment features are correctly implemented and documented
5. **Note:** 10-won floor rounding is correctly implemented in salary detail page

---

## Verification Method

- Used grep/sed to search for Korean UI text in source files
- Verified component imports and prop passing
- Checked actual button text and event handlers
- Verified field names and API calls match manual descriptions
- Cross-referenced between page components and child components
